prep_notes.Tuesday: Brine chicken tonight for John's grilled dinner tomorrow. Mix brine (salt + sugar + water) and submerge chicken breasts — refrigerate overnight.
prep_notes.Wednesday: Pull chicken from brine before John grills. Pat dry. Prep sides if serving any.
prep_notes.Thursday: Thaw shredded chicken if frozen. Mash potatoes ahead — can do after lunch.
prep_notes.Friday: Thaw flounder fillets in fridge tonight or cold water before lunch. Mix cornbread batter ahead.

Monday.lunch: Pork chops, noodles, broccoli + Romaine + raw green beans
Monday.dinner: Brined split chicken breasts + potatoes au gratin + broccoli
Monday.dad_lunch: Leftovers (pork chops, noodles, broccoli) + Romaine + raw green beans

Tuesday.dad_lunch: Leftovers from Monday + Romaine + raw green beans

Wednesday.lunch: Leftovers: chicken + potatoes au gratin + broccoli + rice + Romaine + raw green beans
Wednesday.dad_lunch: Leftovers from Tuesday + Romaine + raw green beans
Wednesday.boys_help: Dad grills · JP light duties (braces day) · Michael: set table

Thursday.lunch: Beef stew + sourdough + Romaine + raw green beans
Thursday.dinner: Shredded chicken + mashed potatoes + canned pork and beans
Thursday.dad_lunch: Leftovers from Wednesday + Romaine + raw green beans
Thursday.boys_help: Quick reheat — medium-low capacity, Latin class · JP: soft food only (braces recovery)

Friday.dad_lunch: Sardine sandwiches or leftovers from Thursday
Friday.boys_help: JP: leads fish fry & plating · Joseph: coleslaw & cornbread · Michael: measure breading

Saturday.lunch: Fried fish + coleslaw + cornbread + Romaine + raw green beans
Saturday.dinner: Black-eyed pea jambalaya with Cajun sausage + baked salmon with rice
Saturday.dad_lunch: Leftovers from Friday + Romaine + raw green beans
Saturday.boys_help: Lauren leads (medium capacity, adventure block midday)

Sunday.notes: Consolidate & discard spoiled items. Flag 'use soon' for next week.
